narrative:
Green Creek B (precinct in Sandusky County) has 567 registered voters, with 48.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.2 percentage points.
